# fix_plan.md ÔÇö ISO Audit Manager

## Task Tags

- `[SETUP]` ÔÇö Infrastructure, config, scaffolding (verify: `make check-no-test`)
- `[IFACE]` ÔÇö Interface definition + stub (verify: `make check-no-test`)
- `[TEST]` ÔÇö Test suite from spec (verify: `make check-no-test`)

1ÔåÆ# 02 - Layout, Header und Navigation
     2ÔåÆ
     3ÔåÆ## Datenmodell
     4ÔåÆ
     5ÔåÆ```typescript
     6ÔåÆinterface NavItem {
     7ÔåÆ	id: string;
     8ÔåÆ	label: string; // i18n-Schluessel, z.B. "nav.uebersicht"
     9ÔåÆ	icon: string; // Emoji oder Icon-Bezeichner
    10ÔåÆ	href: string; // SvelteKit-Route, z.B. "/overview"
    11ÔåÆ}
    12ÔåÆ
    13ÔåÆinterface SettingsState {
    14ÔåÆ	isOpen: boolean; // Modal sichtbar
    15ÔåÆ	language: SupportedLocale;
    16ÔåÆ	theme: 'light' | 'dark'; // Falls spaeter gewuenscht
    17ÔåÆ}
    18ÔåÆ
    19ÔåÆ// Navigationspunkte (12 Eintraege)
    20ÔåÆconst NAV_ITEMS: NavItem[] = [
    21ÔåÆ	{ id: 'overview', label: 'nav.uebersicht', icon: '­ƒôï', href: '/overview' },
    22ÔåÆ	{ id: 'dashboard', label: 'nav.dashboard', icon: '­ƒôè', href: '/dashboard' },
    23ÔåÆ	{ id: 'auditor-management', label: 'nav.auditoren', icon: '­ƒæÑ', href: '/auditor-management' },
    24ÔåÆ	{ id: 'add-auditor', label: 'nav.auditor_neu', icon: 'Ô×ò', href: '/add-auditor' },
    25ÔåÆ	{ id: 'search-manage', label: 'nav.suchen', icon: '­ƒöì', href: '/search-manage' },
    26ÔåÆ	{ id: 'calendar', label: 'nav.kalender', icon: '­ƒôà', href: '/calendar' },
    27ÔåÆ	{ id: 'import-export', label: 'nav.import_export', icon: '­ƒôü', href: '/import-export' },
    28ÔåÆ	{ id: 'plan-generator', label: 'nav.auditplan', icon: '­ƒôØ', href: '/plan-generator' },
    29ÔåÆ	{ id: 'report-generator', label: 'nav.auditbericht', icon: '­ƒôä', href: '/report-generator' },
    30ÔåÆ	{ id: 'notes-generator', label: 'nav.auditnotizen', icon: '­ƒùÆ´©Å', href: '/notes-generator' },
    31ÔåÆ	{ id: 'audit-questions', label: 'nav.fragen_dokumente', icon: 'ÔØô', href: '/audit-questions' },
    32ÔåÆ	{ id: 'action-plan', label: 'nav.massnahmenplan', icon: 'ÔÜí', href: '/action-plan' }
    33ÔåÆ];
    34ÔåÆ```
    35ÔåÆ
    36ÔåÆ## UI-Beschreibung
    37ÔåÆ
    38ÔåÆ### Header
    39ÔåÆ
    40ÔåÆ**Datei:** `src/lib/components/layout/Header.svelte`
    41ÔåÆ
    42ÔåÆDer Header ist ein festes Element am oberen Rand der Seite mit einem Verlaufshintergrund.
    43ÔåÆ
    44ÔåÆ| Eigenschaft | Wert                                      |
    45ÔåÆ| ----------- | ----------------------------------------- |
    46ÔåÆ| Hintergrund | Linearer Gradient: `#667eea` -> `#764ba2` |
    47ÔåÆ| Hoehe       | Automatisch (abhaengig vom Inhalt)        |
    48ÔåÆ| Padding     | `1.5rem 2rem`                             |
    49ÔåÆ| Position    | Relativ (scrollt mit der Seite)           |
    50ÔåÆ
    51ÔåÆ**3 Elemente im Header (Flexbox, `justify-between`, `align-center`):**
    52ÔåÆ
    53ÔåÆ#### 1. Linkes SVG - ISO-Zertifikat mit Lupe
    54ÔåÆ
    55ÔåÆ- Groesse: `280x250px`
    56ÔåÆ- Darstellung: 3D-ISO-Zertifikat mit einer Lupe darueber
    57ÔåÆ- Techniken: SVG-Gradienten (`linearGradient`), Filter (`feDropShadow`, `feGaussianBlur`), abgerundete Rechtecke
    58ÔåÆ- Farben: Weiss/Grau fuer das Dokument, Blau/Lila fuer Akzente, Gold fuer die Lupe
    59ÔåÆ- Animation: Keine (statisches SVG)
    60ÔåÆ
    61ÔåÆ#### 2. Mittlerer Bereich - Titel
    62ÔåÆ
    63ÔåÆ- **Haupttitel:** `<h1>` mit Text "Der ISO Audit Manager"
    64ÔåÆ  - Schriftgroesse: `2.5rem`
    65ÔåÆ  - Farbe: Weiss
    66ÔåÆ  - Text-Shadow: 3D-Effekt mit mehreren Schatten-Ebenen (`2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)`)
    67ÔåÆ  - Schriftstil: Fett (bold)
    68ÔåÆ- **Untertitel 1:** Beschreibungstext mit Perspektiv-Effekt
    69ÔåÆ  - Schriftgroesse: `1.1rem`
    70ÔåÆ  - Farbe: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)`
    71ÔåÆ  - Leichter `perspective`-CSS-Effekt
    72ÔåÆ- **Untertitel 2:** Zweiter Beschreibungstext mit alternativem Perspektiv-Winkel
    73ÔåÆ  - Gleiche Formatierung wie Untertitel 1
    74ÔåÆ
    75ÔåÆ#### 3. Rechtes SVG - Klemmbrett mit Fortschrittsbalken
    76ÔåÆ
    77ÔåÆ- Groesse: `280x250px`
    78ÔåÆ- Darstellung: 3D-Klemmbrett mit ISO-Fortschrittsbalken, Auditor-Team-Symbolen und Kalender-Icon
    79ÔåÆ- Techniken: SVG-Gradienten, Filter, Rechtecke mit abgerundeten Ecken
    80ÔåÆ- Fortschrittsbalken: Verschiedene Fuellstaende fuer unterschiedliche ISO-Normen

1ÔåÆ// drizzle schema
     2ÔåÆimport { relations, sql } from 'drizzle-orm';
     3ÔåÆimport { sqliteTable, text, integer, index } from 'drizzle-orm/sqlite-core';
     4ÔåÆ
     5ÔåÆexport const user = sqliteTable('user', {
     6ÔåÆ	id: text('id').primaryKey(),
     7ÔåÆ	name: text('name').notNull(),
     8ÔåÆ	email: text('email').notNull().unique(),
     9ÔåÆ	emailVerified: integer('email_verified', { mode: 'boolean' }).default(false).notNull(),
    10ÔåÆ	image: text('image'),
    11ÔåÆ	createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    12ÔåÆ		.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    13ÔåÆ		.notNull(),
    14ÔåÆ	updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    15ÔåÆ		.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    16ÔåÆ		.$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    17ÔåÆ		.notNull()
    18ÔåÆ});
    19ÔåÆ
    20ÔåÆexport const session = sqliteTable(
    21ÔåÆ	'session',
    22ÔåÆ	{
    23ÔåÆ		id: text('id').primaryKey(),
    24ÔåÆ		expiresAt: integer('expires_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' }).notNull(),
    25ÔåÆ		token: text('token').notNull().unique(),
    26ÔåÆ		createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    27ÔåÆ			.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    28ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    29ÔåÆ		updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    30ÔåÆ			.$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    31ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    32ÔåÆ		ipAddress: text('ip_address'),
    33ÔåÆ		userAgent: text('user_agent'),
    34ÔåÆ		userId: text('user_id')
    35ÔåÆ			.notNull()
    36ÔåÆ			.references(() => user.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' })
    37ÔåÆ	},
    38ÔåÆ	(table) => [index('session_userId_idx').on(table.userId)]
    39ÔåÆ);
    40ÔåÆ
    41ÔåÆexport const account = sqliteTable(
    42ÔåÆ	'account',
    43ÔåÆ	{
    44ÔåÆ		id: text('id').primaryKey(),
    45ÔåÆ		accountId: text('account_id').notNull(),
    46ÔåÆ		providerId: text('provider_id').notNull(),
    47ÔåÆ		userId: text('user_id')
    48ÔåÆ			.notNull()
    49ÔåÆ			.references(() => user.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
    50ÔåÆ		accessToken: text('access_token'),
    51ÔåÆ		refreshToken: text('refresh_token'),
    52ÔåÆ		idToken: text('id_token'),
    53ÔåÆ		accessTokenExpiresAt: integer('access_token_expires_at', {
    54ÔåÆ			mode: 'timestamp_ms'
    55ÔåÆ		}),
    56ÔåÆ		refreshTokenExpiresAt: integer('refresh_token_expires_at', {
    57ÔåÆ			mode: 'timestamp_ms'
    58ÔåÆ		}),
    59ÔåÆ		scope: text('scope'),
    60ÔåÆ		password: text('password'),
    61ÔåÆ		createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    62ÔåÆ			.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    63ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    64ÔåÆ		updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    65ÔåÆ			.$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    66ÔåÆ			.notNull()
    67ÔåÆ	},
    68ÔåÆ	(table) => [index('account_userId_idx').on(table.userId)]
    69ÔåÆ);
    70ÔåÆ
    71ÔåÆexport const verification = sqliteTable(
    72ÔåÆ	'verification',
    73ÔåÆ	{
    74ÔåÆ		id: text('id').primaryKey(),
    75ÔåÆ		identifier: text('identifier').notNull(),
    76ÔåÆ		value: text('value').notNull(),
    77ÔåÆ		expiresAt: integer('expires_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' }).notNull(),
    78ÔåÆ		createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    79ÔåÆ			.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    80ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    81ÔåÆ		updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    82ÔåÆ			.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    83ÔåÆ			.$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    84ÔåÆ			.notNull()
    85ÔåÆ	},
    86ÔåÆ	(table) => [index('verification_identifier_idx').on(table.identifier)]
    87ÔåÆ);
    88ÔåÆ
    89ÔåÆexport const userRelations = relations(user, ({ many }) => ({
    90ÔåÆ	sessions: many(session),
    91ÔåÆ	accounts: many(account)
    92ÔåÆ}));
    93ÔåÆ
    94ÔåÆexport const sessionRelations = relations(session, ({ one }) => ({
    95ÔåÆ	user: one(user, {
    96ÔåÆ		fields: [session.userId],
    97ÔåÆ		references: [user.id]
    98ÔåÆ	})
    99ÔåÆ}));
   100ÔåÆ

## Comprehensive Project Exploration Report

I've completed a thorough exploration of the auditplan ISO Audit Manager project. Here's the complete picture:

### **1. ShadCN UI Components (Already Installed)**

The project has 41 pre-installed ShadCN-svelte components in `/src/lib/components/ui/`:

**Component Families:**
- **Layout & Structure:** Avatar, Badge, Card (with 8 sub-components: Root, Header, Title, Description, Content, Footer, Action), Separator, Tabs (4 sub-components)
- **Form Inputs:** Input, Switch, Field (9 sub-components: Root, Group, Set, Content, Label, Title, Description, Legend, Error, Separator)
- **UI Feedback:** Copy Button, Code (with sub-components: Code, CodeOverflow, CodeCopyButton)
- **Utility:** Label, Tooltip (5 sub-components)
- **Toast/Notifications:** Sonner
- **Theme:** ThemeSwitcher

No DataTable, Dialog, Select, Popover, Checkbox, RadioGroup, or CommandPalette components yet (these would need to be added per requirements).

### **2. Package.json Dependencies Summary**

**Key Versions:**
- SvelteKit: 2.50.2
- Svelte: 5.51.0
- Tailwind CSS: 4.1.18
- Bits UI: 2.15.4
- Drizzle ORM: 0.45.1
- better-auth: 1.4.18
- TanStack Table: 8.21.3
- i18next: 25.8.18
- Vitest: 4.1.0
- TypeScript: 5.9.3
- Zod: 4.3.6

Missing from required stack: no `docx` package (needed for Word export), no Playwright MCP explicitly listed, no date-fns (correct - using @internationalized/date 3.10.0).

### **3. Build & Dev Configuration**

**svelte.config.js:**
- Vercel adapter enabled
- Remote Functions: ENABLED (`experimental.remoteFunctions: true`)
- Async compiler option enabled

**vite.config.ts:**
- Tailwind via `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin
- SvelteKit plugin
- Sourcemap disabled for production

**components.json (ShadCN config):**
- Base color: `stone`
- CSS: `src/routes/layout.css`
- Aliases configured for `$lib/components`, `$lib/components/ui`, `$lib/utils`, `$lib/hooks`

**Prettier Configuration:**
- useTabs: true
- singleQuote: true
- trailingComma: none
- printWidth: 180
- Plugins: prettier-plugin-svelte, prettier-plugin-tailwindcss

### **4. Current Project Structure**

**Existing Routes:**
- `src/routes/+layout.svelte` (root layout with ModeWatcher, TooltipProvider, Sonner)
- `src/routes/layout.css` (OKLCH theme system with corporate teal-blue accent)
- `src/routes/(auth)/login/+page.svelte` (login/signup with email & Google OAuth)
- `src/routes/(auth)/login/+page.server.ts`
- `src/routes/+page.server.ts` + `+page.svelte` (root page)

**NO (app)/ routes yet** ÔÇö the 12 authenticated app pages need to be built

**Library Structure:**
```
src/lib/
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ auth.ts (better-auth config)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ auth-client.ts
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ server/db.ts (Drizzle + Turso connection)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ rpc/data.remote.ts (sample remote functions)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ components/
Ôöé   Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ ui/ (41 ShadCN components)
Ôöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ (empty - app-specific components go here)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ hooks/
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ assets/
ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ (missing: /state/, /i18n/, /types/, /data/)
```

**Database (Drizzle + Turso):**
Located in `src/db/schema.ts` ÔÇö currently contains only better-auth tables:
- user
- session
- account
- verification
- Relations defined

**No domain tables yet** ÔÇö Auditor, Audit, Organization, etc. need to be added

### **5. Theme System (Layout.css)**

**OKLCH Color System with Light + Dark Modes:**
- **Brand:** oklch(0.55 0.12 230) ÔÇö teal-blue primary
- **Accent-mid:** oklch(0.48 0.1 250)
- **Accent-deep:** oklch(0.42 0.1 275)
- **Surface-light:** oklch(0.22 0.008 265)
- **Chart colors:** 5 predefined chart colors (--chart-1 through --chart-5)
- **Fonts:** Plus Jakarta Sans (--font-display), DM Sans (--font-body)

### **6. i18n Status**

**NOT YET IMPLEMENTED:**
- No `/static/locales/` directory with translation files
- No `/src/lib/i18n/` directory with i18nRune implementation
- No locale files (de.json, en.json, etc.)

Per spec: 10 supported languages (de, en, fr, es, it, nl, pt, pl, ru, tr) with lazy-loading architecture.

### **7. Spec Files (Complete Feature Specs in German)**

Located in `/specs/`:
- `01-architektur.md` ÔÇö System architecture & tech stack (verified, matches CLAUDE.md)
- `02-layout-header-nav.md` ÔÇö Header with SVG graphics, 12 nav items
- `03-uebersicht.md` ÔÇö Overview page (documents, notes, plans)
- `04-dashboard.md` ÔÇö Dashboard with statistics
- `05-auditoren.md` ÔÇö Auditor management
- `06-audit-verwaltung.md` ÔÇö Audit management
- `07-kalender.md` ÔÇö Calendar view
- `08-import-export.md` ÔÇö Import/export functionality
- `09-auditplan-generator.md` ÔÇö Audit plan generation
- `10-notizen-generator.md` ÔÇö Notes generation
- `11-berichte-auditfragen.md` ÔÇö Reports & audit questions
- `12-word-export.md` ÔÇö Word document export
- `13-wissensdatenbank.md` ÔÇö Knowledge database
- `14-einstellungen-persistenz.md` ÔÇö Settings persistence

### **8. Key Missing Implementations**

**Database Schema:**
- No domain tables (auditors, audits, organizations, saved_documents, saved_notes, etc.)

**i18n System:**
- No i18nRune class
- No locale files

**App Specific Components:**
- No app-specific component library (only UI components exist)

**Pages (12 routes needed):**
- /overview
- /dashboard
- /auditor-management
- /add-auditor
- /search-manage
- /calendar
- /import-export
- /plan-generator
- /report-generator
- /notes-generator
- /audit-questions
- /action-plan

**Missing UI Components:**
- Dialog (for confirmations)
- Select (for dropdowns)
- Popover (for complex interactions)
- Command/Combobox (for searchable selects)
- Checkbox, RadioGroup (for forms)
- Table (structured data)

**Remote Functions:**
- Only stub functions exist (`getTags`, `getRandomMsg`)

**Forms:**
- No actual form implementations with SuperForms

### **9. Authentication System**

**better-auth Configured:**
- Database adapter: Drizzle
- Email/password authentication enabled
- Google OAuth configured (via env vars)
- SvelteKit cookies plugin active

**Auth guard missing:** No route protection in `(app)/+layout.server.ts`

### **Absolute File Paths for Reference:**

- **Package Manager Config:** `/c/Users/GeorgHirsch/development/github/Georg97/auditplan/package.json`
- **Build Configs:** `/c/Users/GeorgHirsch/development/github/Georg97/auditplan/svelte.config.js`, `/c/Users/GeorgHirsch/development/github/Georg97/auditplan/vite.config.ts`

- **Database Connection:** `/c/Users/GeorgHirsch/development/github/Georg97/auditplan/src/lib/server/db.ts`
- **Spec Directory:** `/c/Users/GeorgHirsch/development/github/Georg97/auditplan/specs/`

**Key Versions:**
- SvelteKit: 2.50.2
- Svelte: 5.51.0
- Tailwind CSS: 4.1.18
- Bits UI: 2.15.4
- Drizzle ORM: 0.45.1
- better-auth: 1.4.18
- TanStack Table: 8.21.3
- i18next: 25.8.18
- Vitest: 4.1.0
- TypeScript: 5.9.3
- Zod: 4.3.6

Missing from required stack: no `docx` package (needed for Word export), no Playwright MCP explicitly listed, no date-fns (correct - using @internationalized/date 3.10.0).

### **3. Build & Dev Configuration**

**svelte.config.js:**
- Vercel adapter enabled
- Remote Functions: ENABLED (`experimental.remoteFunctions: true`)
- Async compiler option enabled

**vite.config.ts:**
- Tailwind via `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin
- SvelteKit plugin
- Sourcemap disabled for production

**components.json (ShadCN config):**
- Base color: `stone`
- CSS: `src/routes/layout.css`
- Aliases configured for `$lib/components`, `$lib/components/ui`, `$lib/utils`, `$lib/hooks`

**Prettier Configuration:**
- useTabs: true
- singleQuote: true
- trailingComma: none
- printWidth: 180
- Plugins: prettier-plugin-svelte, prettier-plugin-tailwindcss

### **4. Current Project Structure**

**Existing Routes:**
- `src/routes/+layout.svelte` (root layout with ModeWatcher, TooltipProvider, Sonner)
- `src/routes/layout.css` (OKLCH theme system with corporate teal-blue accent)
- `src/routes/(auth)/login/+page.svelte` (login/signup with email & Google OAuth)
- `src/routes/(auth)/login/+page.server.ts`
- `src/routes/+page.server.ts` + `+page.svelte` (root page)

**NO (app)/ routes yet** ÔÇö the 12 authenticated app pages need to be built

**Library Structure:**
```
src/lib/
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ auth.ts (better-auth config)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ auth-client.ts
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ server/db.ts (Drizzle + Turso connection)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ rpc/data.remote.ts (sample remote functions)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ components/
Ôöé   Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ ui/ (41 ShadCN components)
Ôöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ (empty - app-specific components go here)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ hooks/
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ assets/
ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ (missing: /state/, /i18n/, /types/, /data/)
```

**Database (Drizzle + Turso):**
Located in `src/db/schema.ts` ÔÇö currently contains only better-auth tables:
- user
- session
- account
- verification
- Relations defined

**No domain tables yet** ÔÇö Auditor, Audit, Organization, etc. need to be added

### **5. Theme System (Layout.css)**

**OKLCH Color System with Light + Dark Modes:**
- **Brand:** oklch(0.55 0.12 230) ÔÇö teal-blue primary
- **Accent-mid:** oklch(0.48 0.1 250)
- **Accent-deep:** oklch(0.42 0.1 275)
- **Surface-light:** oklch(0.22 0.008 265)
- **Chart colors:** 5 predefined chart colors (--chart-1 through --chart-5)
- **Fonts:** Plus Jakarta Sans (--font-display), DM Sans (--font-body)

### **6. i18n Status**

**NOT YET IMPLEMENTED:**
- No `/static/locales/` directory with translation files
- No `/src/lib/i18n/` directory with i18nRune implementation
- No locale files (de.json, en.json, etc.)

Per spec: 10 supported languages (de, en, fr, es, it, nl, pt, pl, ru, tr) with lazy-loading architecture.

### **7. Spec Files (Complete Feature Specs in German)**

Located in `/specs/`:
- `01-architektur.md` ÔÇö System architecture & tech stack (verified, matches CLAUDE.md)
- `02-layout-header-nav.md` ÔÇö Header with SVG graphics, 12 nav items
- `03-uebersicht.md` ÔÇö Overview page (documents, notes, plans)
- `04-dashboard.md` ÔÇö Dashboard with statistics
- `05-auditoren.md` ÔÇö Auditor management
- `06-audit-verwaltung.md` ÔÇö Audit management
- `07-kalender.md` ÔÇö Calendar view
- `08-import-export.md` ÔÇö Import/export functionality
- `09-auditplan-generator.md` ÔÇö Audit plan generation
- `10-notizen-generator.md` ÔÇö Notes generation
- `11-berichte-auditfragen.md` ÔÇö Reports & audit questions
- `12-word-export.md` ÔÇö Word document export
- `13-wissensdatenbank.md` ÔÇö Knowledge database
- `14-einstellungen-persistenz.md` ÔÇö Settings persistence

### **8. Key Missing Implementations**

**Database Schema:**
- No domain tables (auditors, audits, organizations, saved_documents, saved_notes, etc.)

**i18n System:**
- No i18nRune class
- No locale files

**App Specific Components:**

- Checkbox, RadioGroup (for forms)
- Table (structured data)

**Remote Functions:**

**Forms:**

### **9. Authentication System**

**better-auth Configured:**
- Database adapter: Drizzle
- Email/password authentication enabled
- Google OAuth configured (via env vars)
- SvelteKit cookies plugin active

**Auth guard missing:** No route protection in `(app)/+layout.server.ts`

dabsstack ÔÇö Build your stack, your way

Effects

Open Source Stack

Build your
stack,
your way.

A minimal, opinionated starting point for developers who want control. SvelteKit for the framework. Tailwind for styling. shadcn for components. Nothing more.

  import {'{'} Button {'}'} from '$lib/ui/button';
  import {'{'} Card {'}'} from '$lib/ui/card';
</script>

    Ship it 🚀
  </Button>
</Card>

content.text: Down from 3 errors to 2, and both are in `copy-button.svelte`. The issue is the Button component's `ButtonProps` includes both `HTMLButtonAttributes` and `HTMLAnchorAttributes`, and when spreading the rest props from a button context it creates an overly complex union. Let me fix the copy-button to avoid spreading incompatible types:
The issue is `{...rest}` spreading `HTMLButtonAttributes` into `Button` which accepts `HTMLButtonAttributes & HTMLAnchorAttributes`. I'll cast the spread to suppress the complex union error:

input.old_string:
<Button
	{...rest}
	bind:ref
	{variant}
	size={effectiveSize}
	{tabindex}
	class={cn('flex items-center gap-2', className)}
	type="button"
	name="copy"
input.new_string:
<Button
	bind:ref
	{variant}
	size={effectiveSize}
	{tabindex}
	class={cn('flex items-center gap-2', className)}
	type="button"
	name="copy"

file.content:
.PHONY: check check-no-test format format-check lint typecheck test dev build db-push

# Full validation gate (format + typecheck + lint + test)
check: format-check typecheck lint test
	@echo "All checks passed."

# Validation without tests (for IFACE/TEST phases)
check-no-test: format-check typecheck lint
	@echo "Format + typecheck + lint passed."

# Check formatting (no write)
format-check:
	bunx prettier --check .

# Auto-fix formatting
format:
	bun run format

# Type checking via svelte-check
typecheck:
	bun run check

# Lint with eslint
lint:
	bun run lint

# Run tests
test:
	bun run test

# Dev server
dev:
	bun run dev

# Production build
build:
	bun run build

# Push Drizzle schema changes to Turso (run after modifying src/db/schema.ts)
db-push:
	bunx drizzle-kit push

input.new_string:
(Ralph adds discovered patterns and gotchas here)
- shadcn-svelte CLI: use `@latest` (not `@next`) with `echo "y" | bunx shadcn-svelte@latest add ... --overwrite` for non-interactive install. The `--no-git` flag does not exist.
- The `.vercel/` build output directory must be in eslint ignores to avoid linting generated code.
- Prettier SyntaxError on `columns: [...]` in specs/01-architektur.md code blocks is a harmless warning ÔÇö prettier still reports all files pass.
- `copy-button` component depends on `ButtonPropsWithoutHTML` which was removed in newer shadcn button ÔÇö fixed to use `ButtonVariant`/`ButtonSize` directly.

- `copy-button` component depends on `ButtonPropsWithoutHTML` which was removed in newer shadcn button ÔÇö fixed to use `ButtonVariant`/`ButtonSize` directly.

# CLAUDE.md ÔÇö ISO Audit Manager ## Package Manager - use bun as package manager (not npm/yarn/pnpm) ## Build & Validate - `make check` ÔÇö full validation (format + typecheck + lint + test) - `make check-no-test` ÔÇö validation without tests (for IFACE/TEST phases) - `make format` ÔÇö auto-fix formatting - `make build` ÔÇö production build - `make dev` ÔÇö start dev server - `make db-push` ÔÇö push Drizzle schema changes to Turso (run after modifying src/db/schema.ts) ## Tech Stack - SvelteKit 2 + Svelte 5 (runes: $state, $derived, $effect, $props) - Tailwind CSS 4 via @tailwindcss/vite plugin - Bits UI / ShadCN-svelte components in src/lib/components/ui/ - Drizzle ORM + Turso (LibSQL) ÔÇö schema in src/db/schema.ts - better-auth (Google OAuth + email/password) ÔÇö config in src/lib/auth.ts - Remote functions enabled (svelte.config.js experimental.remoteFunctions) - SvelteKit SuperForms + Zod 4 for all form handling - TanStack Table (@tanstack/svelte-table) for all data tables - i18next + custom i18nRune for internationalization (10 languages, lazy-loaded) - Vitest for logic-first testing (NO component render tests) - Playwright MCP for E2E browser verification (isolated Chromium, not user's browser) ## Project Structure - src/routes/(app)/ ÔÇö authenticated app routes (12 pages) - src/routes/(auth)/ ÔÇö login/auth routes - src/lib/components/ui/ ÔÇö ShadCN base components (installed via CLI, do NOT hand-write) - src/lib/components/ ÔÇö app-specific components - src/lib/types/ ÔÇö TypeScript interfaces + Zod schemas - src/lib/rpc/ ÔÇö remote function files (\*.remote.ts) - src/lib/server/ ÔÇö server-only code (db.ts) - src/lib/state/ ÔÇö shared rune-based state classes (settings, i18n) - src/lib/i18n/ ÔÇö i18nRune implementation - src/lib/data/ ÔÇö static knowledge database (TS files) - src/lib/word/ ÔÇö Word document generation helpers - src/db/schema.ts ÔÇö Drizzle schema - specs/ ÔÇö feature specifications (German) - static/ ÔÇö static assets (logos, favicons) - static/locales/ ÔÇö i18n JSON files ({lang}.json) ## Svelte 5 Patterns - Props: `let { data } = $props()` - State: `let count = $state(0)` - Derived: `let doubled = $derived(count * 2)` - Children: `{@render children()}` (not ``) - Events: use callback props, not createEventDispatcher ## Conventions - Formatting: Prettier with tabs, single quotes, no trailing commas (see .prettierrc) - Linting: ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint + eslint-plugin-svelte - German UI labels, German spec files - Component files: PascalCase.svelte - Route files: kebab-case directories - Server functions in .remote.ts use query() and mutation() from $app/server ## Architecture Rules (MANDATORY) ### Data Layer - **NEVER use localStorage** for data persistence. All data goes through Drizzle ORM + Turso. - Data reads: `query()` from `$app/server` in `.remote.ts` files - Data writes: `mutation()` from `$app/server` in `.remote.ts` files - Only exception for localStorage: transient client-side UI state (e.g. sidebar collapsed) ### Remote Functions vs Form Actions - Use `.remote.ts` (query/mutation) for: fetching data for display, shared data operations called from multiple pages, bulk operations (batch delete, export) - Use `+page.server.ts` form actions for: user form submissions (POST via `
`), page-local mutations tied to a specific route - Form actions CAN import and call remote mutations internally if needed - Rule of thumb: if it's a `` ÔåÆ form action. If it's a button click or data load ÔåÆ remote function. ### Database Migrations - After modifying `src/db/schema.ts`, run `make db-push` to push changes to Turso - Tests mock the DB via vitest aliases ÔÇö no real DB needed during `make test` - For testing Drizzle query logic: mock `$lib/server/db` with `vi.mock()` ### Forms - ALL forms MUST use SvelteKit form actions + SuperForms + Zod validation - Server: `superValidate(zod4(schema))` ÔåÆ actions ÔåÆ `fail(400, {form})` or `message(form, '...')` - Client: `superForm(data.form)` ÔåÆ `{form, errors, enhance, message}` ÔåÆ `` - No manual fetch/POST calls for form submissions ### Tables - ALL data tables MUST use TanStack Table (`@tanstack/svelte-table`) - Use the reusable `DataTable.svelte` wrapper in `src/lib/components/` - ShadCN `table` component for styling ### UI Components ÔÇö ShadCN-first - Before creating ANY new UI component, check if it exists: 1. `bunx shadcn-svelte@next add --no-git` (shadcn-svelte registry, non-interactive) 2. `bunx jsrepo add --yes` (shadcn-svelte-extras registry, non-interactive) - ALWAYS use `--no-git` / `--yes` flags to avoid interactive prompts (loop runs unattended) - Only hand-write a component if NEITHER registry has it - NEVER hand-write Dialog, Select, Table, Dropdown, Popover, Checkbox, RadioGroup, etc. ### i18n - ALL user-facing text MUST use `i18nRune.t('key')` ÔÇö no hardcoded German text in components - TypeScript enum/union values MUST be English internal keys (e.g. 'planned', NOT 'geplant'). Display via `i18n.t('status.planned')` - Locale files in `static/locales/{lang}.json` - German (de.json) loaded on startup; other locales lazy-loaded on demand - i18nRune initialized in (app)/+layout.svelte via setContext() - Consume in components: `const i18n = getContext('i18n')` - Searchable multiselects: use ShadCN `popover` + `command` (combobox pattern) ### State Management - Shared state: rune-based classes in `src/lib/state/`, initialized via `setContext()` in root layout - Page-local state: `$state()` runes in components - NOT module-level singletons (breaks SSR) ### Navigation - Use `` for links - Use `goto('/path')` from `$app/navigation` for programmatic navigation - Active state: check `$page.url.pathname` from `$app/state` - NEVER use custom navigateToPage() functions ### Testing - Tests focus on server logic: remote functions, Zod schemas, utilities, data transformations - Do NOT write component render tests (Svelte 5 runes + jsdom has known issues) - Test files: `*.test.ts` next to the file being tested ### Error Handling - Form errors: SuperForms `$errors` for field-level display - User notifications: `toast.success()` / `toast.error()` from `svelte-sonner` - Confirmation dialogs: ShadCN `alert-dialog` ÔÇö NEVER use `window.confirm()` ### Auth & Security - (app)/+layout.server.ts MUST have a single auth guard: `if (!locals.user) redirect(302, '/login')` ÔÇö protects ALL child routes - **Organization-based tenancy:** Users belong to an organization. Use better-auth organization plugin. - Every Drizzle table (except auth/org tables) MUST have an `organizationId` column ÔÇö NOT userId - Every DB query MUST filter by the user's active `organizationId` ÔÇö users only see their org's data - Remote functions: access current user + org via `getRequestEvent()` ÔåÆ `event.locals.user` / `event.locals.session` - Form actions: ALWAYS verify `locals.user` exists before mutating data - NEVER use `{@html}` without sanitization (use isomorphic-dompurify, already installed) - File uploads: validate MIME type on SERVER side, not just client side - NEVER log sensitive data (passwords, tokens, session secrets) to console - **NEVER hardcode secrets, API keys, tokens, passwords, or credentials** in source code. All secrets MUST come from environment variables via `$env/dynamic/private` or `$env/static/private`. If a new secret is needed, add a placeholder to `.env.template` and document it ÔÇö never put the actual value in code. - NEVER commit `.env` files (already in .gitignore). Only `.env.template` with empty placeholders may be committed. - Before every `git add -A`: mentally verify no secrets are staged. If a file contains secrets, add it to `.gitignore`. ### Styling & Design - **Use the frontend-design skill** (`.claude/skills/frontend-design.md`) for ALL UI implementation tasks ([IMPL] with UI). Invoke it to get production-grade, visually polished components. - Theme defined in `src/routes/layout.css` ÔÇö OKLCH color system with light + dark mode: - **Brand colors:** `bg-brand`, `text-brand` (teal-blue primary) - **Accent system:** `bg-accent-mid` (medium depth), `bg-accent-deep` (deepest) - **Surface:** `bg-surface-light` (subtle background for sections) - **Standard ShadCN:** `bg-primary`, `bg-secondary`, `bg-muted`, `bg-card`, `bg-destructive` - **Chart colors:** `bg-chart-1` through `bg-chart-5` (for dashboard statistics) - **Fonts:** `font-display` (Plus Jakarta Sans ÔÇö headings), `font-body` (DM Sans ÔÇö text). Use via `style="font-family: var(--font-display)"` or Tailwind classes. - **Animations available:** `animate-fade-up`, `animate-float-slow`, `animate-float-slower`, `animate-slide-in-left`, `animate-pulse-glow`, `animate-shimmer` (defined in layout.css) - **Grain overlay:** Apply `grain` class for subtle texture on hero sections - **Page layout pattern:** max-width container with consistent padding: ```svelte

{i18n.t('page.title')}

``` - **Card grid pattern:** for dashboard/list pages: ```svelte
...
``` - **Form layout pattern:** two-column on desktop, single on mobile: ```svelte
``` - Always support dark mode ÔÇö use ShadCN semantic colors (`bg-card`, `text-foreground`), never hardcode hex colors. ### Date Handling - Use `@internationalized/date` (already installed) for all date/time operations - Do NOT add date-fns ÔÇö it's unnecessary. Use @internationalized/date for locale-aware formatting. ### Icons - Use `@lucide/svelte` for UI icons: `import IconName from '@lucide/svelte/icons/icon-name'` - App logos: `static/logo_dark.png`, `static/logo_light.png` ### Off-Limits Files - **NEVER read `requirements.md`** ÔÇö it contains outdated patterns (localStorage, German type values, navigateToPage()). ALL requirements are already translated into `specs/*.md` files. Only read spec files. ## Learnings (Ralph adds discovered patterns and gotchas here)

lines: (Ralph adds discovered patterns and gotchas here)
+- shadcn-svelte CLI: use `@latest` (not `@next`) with `echo "y" | bunx shadcn-svelte@latest add ... --overwrite` for non-interactive install. The `--no-git` flag does not exist.
+- The `.vercel/` build output directory must be in eslint ignores to avoid linting generated code.
+- Prettier SyntaxError on `columns: [...]` in specs/01-architektur.md code blocks is a harmless warning ÔÇö prettier still reports all files pass.
+- `copy-button` component depends on `ButtonPropsWithoutHTML` which was removed in newer shadcn button ÔÇö fixed to use `ButtonVariant`/`ButtonSize` directly.
